task: Replace text-heavy Day 1 checklist with guided in-app practice lab

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to the user-visible issue and runtime verification before final reporting.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard and at least one user-facing or runtime entrypoint check.

changes: Added Day 1 practice_lab data with smartphone/app-opening guide cards, install-or-browser fallback instructions, a practice location table, a copyable prompt, a source verification table, and four result slots.

Replaced the vague Day 1 checklist with app-guided steps: view the practice lab, choose source material in-app, remove sensitive information, fill the copy-paste prompt, open/install the AI tool, fill the verification table, rewrite, and save four outputs.
Added a frontend Day1PracticeLab block with visual cards, tables, copy button, prompt panel, source-check rows, and result-slot checklist.
Added refresh migration so incomplete legacy Day 1 sessions receive the guided practice lab without losing existing proof/notes/feedback.

verification.name: legacy vague checklist source search
verification.command: rg -n "업무 장면 1개를 실제로 질문했다|생활 장면 1개를 실제로 질문했다|글쓰기 장면 1개를 실제로 질문했다" harness-os/backend/main.py tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py harness-os/edu-app/src --glob '!**/dist/**'
verification.result: passed for runtime paths: remaining matches are regression test fixture/assertions proving legacy text is removed during refresh

residual_risk: Production deployment and runtime bundle checks are pending in this evidence snapshot.
